response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack experience, deep open-source involvement, and solid Linux/architecture exposure, but the role's hard requirements are not met: German is only Basic (role requires C1 minimum), there is no explicit people-leadership or team-management track record, and Python and UML — both called out in the JD — are absent from the skills profile.
strengths: Long-running open-source founder work (GISCollective) demonstrates architecture and product ownership
Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Strong Linux, DevOps, and CI/CD background aligned with open-source/Unix focus
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 minimum hard requirement
No explicit leadership of an interdisciplinary team or formal tech-lead/head-of-dev title
Python and UML proficiency not evidenced; core required/desired skills missing

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit team leadership experience
